title: Fel's Machine Guns WWI
description: The power of WWI weaponry in your hands
body:
# Fel's Machine Guns WWI

 

![awawa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffacc7426415bb3a3765bb6ef952b5a8e0a54ad3.png)

 

 

 

 

Fel's Machine Guns WWI is a mod that adds WWI age machine guns to the game, this is also a complete remaster of the new upcoming content, with better features and more!

 

![wwawa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2af245dd25af0a98190c5bf0d9ea879f67a9c96f.png)

 

## Features:

 

New features like: Some guns have fixed elevation, the possibility of pulling the bolt being mounted in the gun.
Improvements like: Better rotation, gun assembly, crafting, and more!
New visuals like: animated muzzle flash, better tracer, and better smoke.
 

### The mod currently adds 3 weapons and more will come!

 

This Mod requires Geckolib and Iguana Lib to work

 

Report any bug at my [Felina Mods Discord](https://discord.gg/t5UxRGwwFE)

 

If you want to make a donation take a look at my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/FelinaMods) or dm me on Discord.

 

 

 

 

 

 

![www](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67bc1f18865cf97f6bc4001db717ac823de13bc1_0.webp)
